About Services Team Contact

Engineering the
Future of Your
Legacy.

We transform mid-market infrastructure and energy firms into high-valuation, autonomous assets. Combining architectural precision with broadcast-grade narrative, we build the systems that make your business undeniable.

Book a Valuation Strategy Session
The General Interest Standard

From Operational Grit
to Enterprise Value.

Most $1M+ SDE businesses are built on years of hard-earned expertise, but they are often limited by their own success. We specialize in the Optimization-to-Exit pipeline.

Whether you are scaling for a decade of growth or preparing for a high-multiple sale, General Interest LLC provides the structural rigor and digital automation required to decouple the owner from the operation — turning a "job" into a high-yield institutional asset.

Core Service Offerings

The Three Pillars

I

Operational Integrity: Building the Business Machine

Structural Optimization & Blueprinting

The Challenge

Your business relies on "Tribal Knowledge" and manual oversight, making it a liability to sophisticated buyers.

Our Solution

We conduct a top-down architectural audit of your workflows. We map every process and eliminate bottlenecks in project management to deliver a "Digital Twin" of your operations.

The Result

A business that functions with precision, ensuring the brand thrives independently of the founder.

II

The Autonomous Firm: 2026 Tech-Stack Integration

AI-Integrated Infrastructure

The Challenge

Stagnant margins and high overhead due to manual bidding, scheduling, and reporting.

Our Solution

We deploy custom AI agents tailored for the construction and energy sectors. From automated estimation to real-time predictive site analytics, we move your firm from "reactive" to "predictive."

The Result

Radical efficiency that directly inflates your SDE and attracts tech-forward acquirers.

III

Prestige Positioning: From Vendor to Institution

Market Authority & Narrative Strategy

The Challenge

You are the best in your field, but your digital presence lacks the "gravity" of a market leader.

Our Solution

Leveraging broadcast media expertise, we document your infrastructure legacy. We create high-fidelity content and 3D visualizations that position your firm as the gold standard.

The Result

A brand that commands a premium multiple and an aggressive buyer pool.

Architects of Value

The Team

A collective of specialists who have built at scale — from global coworking infrastructures to national broadcast networks.

Aaron David Mendonca

Innovation & Corporate Development

Aaron bridges the gap between physical assets and corporate growth. With a background in architecture and energy, he previously served as the Head of Business Development at WeWork Construction Innovation. He specializes in identifying undervalued operational levers and engineering the strategic partnerships that drive high-multiple exits.

Adalberto Avila

Design & Media Strategy

A veteran of the high-stakes world of broadcast media, Adalberto is a Seasoned Motion Graphics Designer at NBCUniversal Telemundo. He translates complex industrial operations into compelling visual narratives. By leveraging 3D animation and creative strategy, he ensures our clients' businesses are positioned as institutional leaders.

Tim Dumatrait

Technology & Construction Systems

Tim is a systems thinker with 15 years of experience at the intersection of creative design and technical execution. His expertise lies in driving technology solutions across product development and construction. He focuses on the "Internal Infrastructure," implementing the AI-driven automations that turn manual labor into scalable systems.

The Residency

A Global Perspective
on Growth.

To maintain the high-touch nature of our consultancy, General Interest LLC only accepts a select number of partnerships per quarter. For our premier partners, we host strategic sessions at our private villa in Lake Como, Italy.

This is where we finalize exit strategies and legacy planning in an environment built for high-level thinking, away from the noise of the day-to-day operation.

Your Business is an
Infrastructure Project.
Build it to Last.

General Interest LLC

Miami  |  New York  |  Lake Como, IT

Apply for a High-Impact Consultation

Inquiries are limited to businesses with $1M+ SDE looking to institutionalize their legacy.

Builders and doers. Proudly based in the USA. 🇺🇸
